# Contributing to Absence Management

Thank you for your interest in contributing! Please follow the guidelines below when working on any of the repositories in this organisation.

## Repositories

Each component lives in its own repository:

- **Frontend**: [Absence-Management-frontend](https://github.com/ay-boutera/Absence-Management-frontend)
- **Backend**: [Absence-Management-backend](https://github.com/ay-boutera/Absence-Management-backend)
- **Mobile**: [Absence-Management-mobile](https://github.com/ay-boutera/Absence-Management-mobile)

Please open issues and pull requests in the appropriate repository.

## How to Contribute

1. **Fork** the relevant repository.
2. **Create a branch** from `main` (e.g. `feature/my-feature` or `fix/my-bug`).
3. **Make your changes** following the coding style of the project.
4. **Write or update tests** as needed.
5. **Open a pull request** against the `main` branch of the upstream repository.

## Reporting Issues

- Search existing issues before opening a new one.
- Include steps to reproduce, expected behaviour, and actual behaviour.
- Attach relevant logs or screenshots when applicable.

## Code Style

Follow the conventions already established in each repository. When in doubt, match the style of the surrounding code.

## Code of Conduct

By contributing you agree to abide by our [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
